## Analyzers (1)

### OktaUserLookup `v1.0`
Okta User Lookup is an analyzer for TheHive to enrich mail observables from data through the Okta users API

- **Author:** Martin Jaan Leesment
- **License:** AGPL-V3
- **Data Types:** `mail`
- **Configuration:** [View config](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/Okta/OktaUserLookup.json)
